testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.integration.TwampLoopbackTest

testcase.name: sequential sessions on same controller - both complete without error()
unauthenticated loopback - 100 packets - packetsRecv == 100 and fwdLossPct == 0()

testsuite.system-out: 09:36:39.048 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector listening on /127.0.0.1:49698 09:36:39.073 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 09:36:41.184 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 09:36:43.306 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector stopped 09:36:43.318 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector listening on /127.0.0.1:49702 09:36:43.347 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 09:36:45.866 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector stopped 09:36:45.883 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector listening on /127.0.0.1:49704 09:36:45.909 [twamp-reflector] DEBUG io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- Accepted TWAMP control connection from /127.0.0.1 09:36:48.134 [twamp-reflector] INFO io.slogr.agent.engine.twamp.responder.TwampReflector -- TWAMP reflector stopped
